Uses of Interface
org.apache.juneau.http.HttpHeader

Packages that use HttpHeader
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.http
HTTP Part Annotations
org.apache.juneau.http.header
Next-generation HTTP header implementations.
org.apache.juneau.http.resource
Next-generation HTTP resource types — bodies bundled with associated headers.
org.apache.juneau.http.response
Next-generation HTTP response types.
org.apache.juneau.rest.client
Next-generation REST client — transport-agnostic HTTP client built on Juneau's serialization stack.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server
REST Server API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.httppart
REST HTTP Parts
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.staticfile
REST Static Files Support

    Method
    Description
    static HttpHeader
    HttpHeaders.header(String name, String value)
    Creates a generic HttpHeader with the given name and value.
    static HttpHeader
    HttpHeaders.header(String name, Supplier<String> valueSupplier)
    Creates a generic HttpHeader with a lazy value supplier.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<HttpHeader>
    HttpResource.getHeaders()
    Returns the headers associated with this resource.

    Base for integer headers.

    Base type for headers whose wire format is an Accept-style list of media ranges.

    Base type for headers whose value is a single MediaType (e.g.
    class 
    HttpStringHeader
    Base type for HTTP headers whose value is an opaque string (or lazy Supplier of string).

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.http.header that return HttpHeader
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    HttpHeader[]
    HttpHeaderList.getAll()
    Returns all headers in this list as a typed array.
    HttpHeader
    HttpHeaderList.getFirst(String name)
    Returns the first header with the given name, or null if absent.
    HttpHeader
    HttpHeaderList.getLast(String name)
    Returns the last header with the given name, or null if absent.
    HttpHeader[]
    HttpHeaderList.toHeaderArray()
    Returns the headers in this list as a typed array.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.http.header that return types with arguments of type HttpHeader
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<HttpHeader>
    HttpHeaderList.getAll(String name)
    Returns all headers with the given name in insertion order.
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.http.header with parameters of type HttpHeader
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    HttpHeaderList
    HttpHeaderList.append(HttpHeader value)
    Appends the given header.
    HttpHeaderList
    HttpHeaderList.append(HttpHeader... values)
    Appends the given headers in order.
    static HttpHeaderList
    HttpHeaderList.of(HttpHeader... headers)
    Creates a new HttpHeaderList initialized with the given headers.
    HttpHeaderList
    HttpHeaderList.set(HttpHeader value)
    Sets the given header, replacing any prior entry with the same name.
    HttpHeaderList
    HttpHeaderList.set(HttpHeader... values)
    Sets the given headers, each replacing any prior entry with the same name.
    HttpHeaderList
    HttpHeaderList.setDefault(HttpHeader value)
    Sets the given header as a default.
    HttpHeaderList
    HttpHeaderList.setDefault(HttpHeader... values)
    Sets the given headers as defaults, in order.
    Method parameters in org.apache.juneau.http.header with type arguments of type HttpHeader
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    HttpHeaderList
    HttpHeaderList.append(List<HttpHeader> values)
    Appends the given headers in order.
    HttpHeaderList
    HttpHeaderList.forEach(String name, Consumer<HttpHeader> action)
    Performs an action on each header whose name matches.
    static HttpHeaderList
    HttpHeaderList.of(List<HttpHeader> headers)
    Creates a new HttpHeaderList initialized with the given headers.

    Method
    Description

    Description

    Returns a new instance with the given header added.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static HttpResourceBean
    HttpResourceBean.of(HttpBody body, List<HttpHeader> headers)
    Creates an HttpResourceBean wrapping the given body and headers.

    HttpResourceBean.withHeaders(List<HttpHeader> toAdd)
    Returns a new instance with the given headers added.

    BasicHttpException.getHeaders()

    HttpResponseMessage.getHeaders()
    Returns all response headers, in the order they were received.

    HttpResponseMessage.getHeaders(String name)
    Returns all response headers with the given name (case-insensitive).
    Methods in org.apache.juneau.http.response with parameters of type HttpHeader
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    BasicHttpException
    BasicHttpException.addHeader(HttpHeader value)
    Appends a header to the end of the header list.
    BasicHttpResponse
    BasicHttpResponse.addHeader(HttpHeader value)
    Appends a header to the end of the header list.
    BasicHttpException
    BasicHttpException.setHeader(HttpHeader value)
    Sets a single header, replacing any existing header with the same name.
    BasicHttpResponse
    BasicHttpResponse.setHeader(HttpHeader value)
    Sets a single header, replacing any existing header with the same name.
    BasicHttpException
    BasicHttpException.setHeaders(HttpHeader... values)
    Replaces all headers with the given array.
    BasicHttpResponse
    BasicHttpResponse.setHeaders(HttpHeader... values)
    Replaces all headers with the given array.
    BasicHttpResponse
    BasicHttpResponse.withHeader(HttpHeader header)
    Returns a new instance with the given header added.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    BasicHttpException.setHeaders(List<HttpHeader> values)
    Replaces all headers with the given list.
    BasicHttpResponse
    BasicHttpResponse.setHeaders(List<HttpHeader> values)
    Replaces all headers with the given list.
